temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man in a black suit, with a shocked and panicked expression, aims a handgun with both hands. He is positioned behind a metal counter, with a computer monitor and a 'Cirrus' ATM machine visible behind him. The scene is shot with a blue-tinted, overexposed filter, giving it a dreamlike or flashback quality. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and violent situation, showing a character in the middle of a confrontation or an act of violence.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A dramatic and emotional orchestral score begins to play, heightening the tension.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to an outdoor location where a man in a black suit lies motionless on the ground, his shirt stained with blood. His head is propped up on a small, decorative evergreen tree. In the background, three other men in suits, including one in a light-colored suit, rush towards the scene with concerned and shocked expressions. (Storyline: This shot reveals the tragic outcome of the implied violence, showing the aftermath of a shooting and the arrival of onlookers or associates.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The dramatic orchestral music continues, emphasizing the gravity of the situation.)
